concept: Talk / The Open Flow of Mind
description: To engage in conversation; the informal, reciprocal exchange of thoughts and ideas. It is less formal than dialogue and more interactive than speech.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'no' (mind, thought) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure literally means 'an open mind' or 'the flow of mind into open space.' This captures the informal, conversational nature of talking. The sound is simple and inviting.
